title: schultesianthus suaveolens
intro: Schultesianthus suaveolens is a flowering plant species in the family Solanaceae, commonly known as the "sweet-scented bush" due to its fragrant flowers. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Schultesianthus suaveolens include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, or used in topical applications to harness its medicinal properties.
